name: Image Agent Harness
description: Constrains AI Agent Apps for image prompt design, generation jobs, and local artifact review.

softwareSpecies.name: Image Agent
softwareSpecies.description: A provider-bound image generation app for prompt recipes, variants, and generated artifacts.

system: Generate an AI Agent App focused on image prompt design, generation jobs, status tracking, and artifact review.
Use only image-capable provider requirements through the Sofvary AI Gateway.
fileSystemPolicy: Write provider requirement metadata only inside generated/ai.
Write React UI files only inside generated/react.
Store generated image references as workspace-local artifact metadata only.
outputRules: Show provider binding status without displaying API keys or secure refs.
Send image generation requests only to the local Sofvary AI Gateway.
Do not embed provider credentials or remote provider URLs in generated source.
